templates.name: If the items I want are not yet on your site, can I pay online somehow?
templates.content: Yes! Simply call the store, we will give you a total for your local delivery or in-store pickup order, and you can choose the "custom order" product (located on the main menu) and insert the amount there, and then proceed with checkout as normal.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/leesdiscountliquor/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/leesdiscountliquor

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to contact us via this link: https://shop.leesdiscountliquor.com/contactus Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: To find the phone number, hours, or address for a specific location, select the participating store here: https://shop.leesdiscountliquor.com/buy-alcohol

templates.name: For local delivery, do I need to be home?
templates.content: Yes. Or someone else over 21 needs to be there to accept and sign for the delivery. Please note that ID will be checked.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to contact us via this link: https://shop.leesdiscountliquor.com/contactus Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Can I use the 10% off coupon code/discount even if I order by phone?
templates.content: Yes! We will apply the 10% off coupon code before we give you the total amount.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://shop.leesdiscountliquor.com/locations

templates.name: How soon will I be able to pickup my order?
templates.content: Usually within an hour, often even sooner.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://shop.leesdiscountliquor.com/contactus Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free shipping/delivery
templates.content: We don't currently offer free delivery, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://shop.leesdiscountliquor.com/faq

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Please note that we offer local delivery and in-store pick-up in Las Vegas only. You'll be able to choose your preferred method in your cart. If you decide to go for delivery, you can choose the delivery date at checkout.

templates.name: New year store working hours
templates.content: On December 31st our stores are open from 9 am - 11 pm and on January 1st from 10 am - 6 pm.
